definitions.text: Easily damaged or requiring careful handling.
examples: Those clothes are made from delicate lace.

definitions.text: Characterized by a fine structure or thin lines.
examples: The spider wove a delicate web.

definitions.text: Intended for use with fragile items.
examples: Set the washing machine to the delicate cycle.

definitions.text: A delicate item of clothing, especially underwear or lingerie.
examples: Don't put that in with your jeans: it's a delicate!

definitions.text: A delicate, luxurious, or effeminate person.
